title: Reactivity reference
text: Reactives graph-tracked nodes. Dependencies captured dynamically reactive code reads inputs/reactives. Input events invalidate downstream dependents. Dirty nodes recompute lazily read.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Creates cached reactive expression.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Mutable reactive value: call argument read; call one argument update invalidate dependents.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Reactive value updates event triggers. Useful “Apply” button semantics.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Side-effect blocks: observe every cycle, selected events.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Reads values without registering dependencies current block.

title: Reactivity reference
text: Short-circuits values falsy. renderers, output resolution skipped cycle. reactives, previous stable value retained available.

title: Reactivity reference
text: input event: input state updates, dependents input node marked dirty, server code runs, outputs resolve renderer expressions.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Léopold Guyot. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Guyot L (2026). rtui: TUI Framework R. R package version 0.0.1, https://leopoldguyot.github.io/rtui/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {rtui: TUI Framework for R},   author = {Léopold Guyot},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://leopoldguyot.github.io/rtui/}, }

title: TUI Framework for R
text: declarative Terminal User Interface (TUI) framework R, backed FTXUI via Rcpp.

title: TUI Framework for R
text: need C++17-capable compiler toolchain. Linux: install distro’s standard C/C++ build tools (gcc/g++, make). macOS: install Xcode Command Line Tools (xcode-select --install). Windows: install Rtools run modern terminal (Windows Terminal, PowerShell, recent cmd.exe VT enabled). also need Rcpp R package:

title: TUI Framework for R
code: library(rtui)  app <- tuiApp(   ui = tuiColumn(     tuiOutputNumeric("counter"),     tuiOutputText("name"),     tuiRow(       tuiInputButton("Increment", id = "inc"),       tuiInputButton("Decrement", id = "dec"),       tuiInputButton("Apply name", id = "applyName")     ),     tuiInputText(id = "nameInput", value = "John")   ),   server = function(input, output) {     counter <- tuiReactive(input$inc - input$dec)     appliedName <- tuiReactiveEvent(input$applyName, runAtInit = TRUE, {       input$nameInput     })      tuiObserveEvent(counter(), {       currentName <- tuiIsolate(appliedName())       message("counter changed while name is ", currentName)     })      output$counter <- tuiRenderNumeric(counter(), digits = 0)     output$name <- tuiRenderText(paste("Your name is:", appliedName()))   } )  tuiRun(app)  # press Escape or Ctrl+Q to quit

title: TUI Framework for R
text: Navigate Tab / arrow keys, activate buttons Enter.

title: TUI Framework for R
text: getting-started: quick onboarding minimal app pattern. explained-example: full app walkthrough step--step reactive flow. reactivity-reference: concise reference graph-based reactivity model.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: Defines terminal UI application UI tree server function. runtime automatically manages input output state, similarly Shiny's conceptual model.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: ui UI component tree built tuiColumn(), tuiRow(), tuiOutputText(), tuiOutputNumeric(), tuiInputButton(), tuiInputText(). server function called server(input, output). input output environments: input$<id> updated automatically buttons text inputs. assign rendered outputs output$<name> <- tuiRenderText(...) output$<name> <- tuiRenderNumeric(...). use tuiObserveEvent() / tuiReactiveEvent() event-based updates.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
text: object class rtuiApp.

title: Create a TUI application — tuiApp
code: app <- tuiApp(   ui = tuiColumn(     tuiOutputNumeric("counter"),     tuiInputButton("Increment", id = "inc")   ),   server = function(input, output) {     output$counter <- tuiRenderNumeric(input$inc)   } )

title: Button input component — tuiInputButton
text: focusable button. activated (Enter key), increments input$id triggers server update.

title: Button input component — tuiInputButton
text: label character string shown button label. id character string used input key (input$<id>).

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: focusable single-line text input. typed value stored automatically input$<id> triggers server update change. input starts value.

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: id character string used input key (input$<id>). placeholder character string shown input empty. value character string used initial/default input value.

title: Text input component — tuiInputText
text: rtuiComponent list node type "input".

what: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
title: Evaluate an expression in isolation — tuiIsolate
text: Evaluates expr without publishing reactive read-change information current server cycle. useful want current value reactive object without making act event trigger.
